info.name: EDU STACK RESTful API
info.description: Postman collection for the EDU STACK RESTful API, updated to include new examination and result management features.

item.name: Get all Exam Papers for a Term/Session

request.description: Gets all exam papers for a given term and session. Requires Teacher role.
Adds manual marks for a paper-based test and can optionally include psychomotor/affective trait assessments for the student in the same request. Requires Teacher role.
Gets the full details of a single exam attempt, including the student's answers and correct answers. Accessible by Students (own attempts), Teachers, and Admins.
Generates a comprehensive, detailed report card for a single student for a specific term, matching the format of the sample image.

response.name: Success
